name: Boya Chinese Elementary Starter II (博雅汉语·初级起步篇 II)
description: Mandarin vocabulary from Boya Chinese Elementary Starter Volume II (Li Xiaoqi et al.; Peking University Press). Hand-entered as a study technique.

field_values.value: to see; to catch sight of
to see off; to drop off
to return/go back; to call back
(measure word for train or airplane voyages)
keep an eye on/be careful of
(counter for long, thin, and inflexible objects)
我想去的国家很多，比如英国和日本。
to open; to bloom; to leave/start (train bus); to switch on; to hold a meeting; to drive
dining room; dining hall (in a restaurant?)
fence; column/box or text or data
to be going to X (formal yào)
to ring; to make a sound
(used after verbs to indicate upward movement)
all at once; all of a sudden
husband [Taiwan/Hong Kong?]; sir; Mr.; waiter (some places)
in the blink of an eye/in an instant
to produce; to give rise to
have nothing to do with X
(after verb to indicate past action or state)
I have never V until now (but...)
从来不V I have never V (period)...
饶丽老师辅导我们汉语。
be sure to; must never (in imperative sentences)
to love; to like to do (used with verb or family/lover)
go though, pass (literally and figuratively); experience
to pass through; to go across
(measure word for sudden events that last a short time)
to flutter or be carried (by the wind); to blow (in the air)
to hold in both hands (with care or pride)
to admire/envy (always in a positive sense)
to put in effect; to implement; to carry out
to remember; to keep in mind
to joke/jest; to make fun of; to tease
to be called/named; to call/name; to greet; to let; to ask
to report for duty; to register/check in
dare; be brave enough; be bold
to hold X in arms; to embrace/hug
有人敲门/Somebody's knocking at the door.
to part with/be separated from; to distinguish
in (the) face of; before; in front (of)
for; on behalf of (similar to 给)
